Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alchemists]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Alchemists wear glass-eyed masks and long, stained aprons.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Alchemists are part of the Independent alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The alchemists have a fortune that may sway public opinion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Alchemists perform testing involving potions and injections.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The alchemists are one of the four Independent Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The alchemists are moving, funded by Bareius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The alchemists play a vital support role for the Guilds.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Alchemists are a type of Independent.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
